question: How do I submit my exam before the timer runs out?
reference_answer: Click the Submit Exam button in the bottom navigation bar, then confirm submission in the dialog that appears. Make sure to do this before the timer reaches zero, since the exam auto-submits automatically when time expires.

question: My webcam isn't being detected, what should I do?
reference_answer: Check that you've granted camera permission to the browser, then refresh the exam page. If the webcam still isn't detected, use the in-exam chat to contact your proctor for help before continuing.

question: Can I use a calculator during this exam?
reference_answer: Check the exam instructions panel - if calculator use is listed as allowed for this section, use the on-screen calculator tool. Physical or external calculators are not permitted unless explicitly stated in the exam rules.

question: How much time do I have left?
reference_answer: The remaining time is shown in the timer at the top of the exam screen and updates automatically.

question: I got disconnected and lost my internet connection, will my answers be saved?
reference_answer: Your answers are saved automatically as you go. Log back in using the same exam link and your progress, including the remaining time, will resume from where you left off.
